mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: central obesity, moon facies, hypertriamercoticoid state, thinning of skin with easy bruising, acanthosis nigricans, hirsutism, depression, anxiety, increased adipose tissue, hyperglycemia, polydipsia, edema, subcutaneous spheroids, tip-toe gait, ectopic fat deposition, and hypertension

short stature, round face, hypogonadism, hyperphagia, obesity, small hands and feet, hypothalamic dysfunction leading to growth hormone deficiency, sleep apnea, behavior problems including attention deficit, learning difficulties, and mental retardation, strabismus, almond shaped eyes, narrow bifrontal diameter, and umbilical hernias

lentigenes chlorides, myxomas, schwannomas, scleral leukocoria, endocrine overactivity, acromegaly, gigantismo, Cushing syndrome, Addison’s disease, testicular tumors, pituitary microadenoma, thyroid nodules, and cutaneous pigmented lesions
café au lait spots, precocious puberty, polyostotic fibrous dysplasia, irregular teeth, hyperthyroidism or hyperparathyroidism, hemihypertrophy, and various other endocrine disorders

salt wasting, metabolic alkalosis, hypokalemic metabolic acidosis, nephrogenic diabetes insipidus, failure to thrive, muscle cramps, polydipsia, polyuria, nocturnal enuresis, and electrolyte imbalances
angiokeratomas, corneal opacities, hearing loss, cardiac involvement, proteinuria, kidney damage, pain in extremities, paresthesia, and gastrointestinal symptoms such as diarrhea and bloating

intellectual disability, delayed speech, seizures, absent or reduced corpus callosum, distinctive facial features, broad forehead, flat midface, long philtrum, prominent ears, wide nasal bridge, downslanted palpebral fissures, and mild micrognathia
bilateral vestibular schwannomas, optic nerve gliomas, freckles around mouth and axillae, cafe-au-lait macules, scoliosis, dislocation of lens, and neurogenic bladder
marfanoid habitus, mental retardation, osteopenia, joint contractures, ectropion, ptosis, dry mucous membranes, homocystinuria, and decreased sulfur amino acid levels
skeletal dysplasia, coarse faces, thickened lips, tongue protrusion, respiratory distress, valvular heart defects, kyphoscoliosis, and short stature
